title: phases: analysis code and data for "Are the phases real? Distinguishing bounded interaction groups from spatially structured drift in lower Mississippi Valley decorated ceramics"
description: Analysis code and data for the study distinguishing bounded interaction groups from spatially structured drift in late pre-contact lower Mississippi Valley decorated-ceramic assemblages. Includes the transmission-signature pipeline, the drift-versus-groups generative comparison, the manuscript figures, and the per-analysis result reports.
access_conditions: Held private during peer review; will be opened on publication.
